💬 Purani Chat Kaise Dekhen? (How to View Old Chats?)

📱 Steps to access your chat history:
1️⃣ Messages Tab: Click on "Messages" tab to see all conversations
2️⃣ Select Chat: Click on any driver's name to open old conversation (purani chat)
3️⃣ View History: Scroll up to see all previous messages
4️⃣ Go Back: Click the ← back arrow to return to conversations list

💡 Tip: Unread messages will show a red "New" badge
